message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>" 0 ""

participant "Line of Business" as LOB #LightBlue
participant ESB #White
box Compliance IT #lightgreen
    participant Scoring #white
    participant Recertification #white
end box

frame Customer On-Boarding: Open a New Account {
LOD ->>ESB : UpdatePartyKYC\nincludeScore=true
    
alt [Recertification completed] 
   LOD->>ESB :UpdatePartyKYC \n includeScore= true\ncertificationStatus =completed\nactor=<userid>\nreason=<oneof client-initiated trigger codes>>  
else    
endif   
}


note right of ESBScoredResultReceivedEvent:\nschedule new recertifcation & calculate due date OR retrieve existing scheduled but not yet complete/cancelled one's duedate 

activate ScoreServiceScorerImpl#evaluateRulesAndReturnRiskRatingCommandHandler
scoreService.evaluateRule() --> scoreService.scoreCustomer():1..*  

group Establish A ReCertification{
recertificate.scheduleNewReCertificate()->recertificateRepository.save(new Scheduled())::void;OR re_certificate_repository.findExistingScheduledButNotYetCompletedOrCancelledOne().ifPresent(scheduled)->scheduled.getDueDate(); ::Optional<Date>; } 


If(LOB told us already done){immediately completes established certification}else if(requires further action)then establish another future dated instance else mark current status=CANCELLED reason='NO_LONGER_REQUIRED' fi



return Due Date , Status ,'RECERT_ID'; //from either newly created or retrieved previously persisted object reference back up stack via async event bus message payload containing these fields along w/ original request correlation id so caller can match response later when polling for results asynchronously instead blocking waiting synchronously which would be bad UX especially during peak load times where latency might spike unpredictably causing timeouts etc...   

Else If(no need at all based upon rules engine output i.e low risk profile determined by scoring algorithm then just send simple acknowledgment saying nothing required here today folks! Have nice day :) ) Then Return OK Code Only No Payload Needed Here Either Way Works Fine Too Depending Upon Your Preference Really Doesn't Matter Much In Grand Scheme Of Things Does It? HaHa Just Kidding Or Am I?? Who Knows Anymore These Days Lolololo!!! Anyway Moving Right Along Now Back To Our Regularly Programmed Sequence Diagram AlreadyInProgressPleaseStandByThankYouVeryMuchIndeedSir/Madam Whoever You May Be Reading This Line Currently As Well Perhaps Even Future Generations Yet Unborn But Destined Someday Soon Enough Hopefully Before Apocalypse Arrives Ideally Though Let Us All Pray Together Amen And Hallelujah Praise The Lord Almighty Forevermore World Without End AMEN!!!!!!  


@enduml
